ddls:
CREATE TABLE "swimmers" (
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swimmer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the swimmer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the swimmer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the swimmer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the swimmer (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the swimmer is affiliated with */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the swimmer */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach associated with the swimmer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the swimmer's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the swimmer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the swimmer is currently active in competitions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swimmers_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach associated with the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 500 Y Free) */,
  "event_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event */,
  "event_units" TEXT /* Units of the distance (e.g., Yards, Meters) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Freestyle, Backstroke) */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., Open, Junior, Senior) */,
  "is_olympic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is an Olympic event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of the competition (e.g., National, Regional, International) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the competition's website */,
  "is_championship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the competition is a championship event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swimmer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time achieved by the swimmer */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score awarded for the performance */,
  "nisca_score" INTEGER /* NISCA (National Interscholastic Swim Coaches Association) score */,
  "heat_number" INTEGER /* Heat number in which the swimmer competed */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number in which the swimmer swam */,
  "is_disqualified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the swimmer was disqualified */,
  "disqualification_reason" TEXT /* Reason for disqualification if applicable */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final rank in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_authorized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is authorized to access sensitive information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swimmer */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Average Speed, Stroke Rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., Speed, Endurance) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach who recorded the metric */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is an official record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "swimmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swimmer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., 1 to 10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the swimmer in the event */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach who gave the rating */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is an official record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_swimmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("swimmer_id") REFERENCES swimmers ("swimmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., result update, schedule change) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (True if read, False if unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
